templates.name: Do I get a discount for leaving a review!
templates.content: You will receive a 10% discount for leaving a review. Please check your spam and promo folders for the code as well since our emails sometimes end up there.

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/milly/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/MillyNY

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customercare@milly.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at customercare@milly.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.milly.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-800-223-2664 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a referral program where you can give your friends 20%, and get $20 off your next order. Check it out here - https://www.milly.com/pages/refer-a-friend

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $150. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customercare@milly.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://www.milly.com/pages/returns-and-exchanges

templates.name: Shipping Time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1 business day and we usually ship via FedEx. Once shipped, it will take 2-7 business days for domestic orders, and 3-20 business days for international orders.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Here's our size guide for your reference: https://www.milly.com/pages/size-guide If you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: Can I return/exchange final sale items? (edit accordingly)
templates.content: Let me check on this with my team for you! If you haven't placed your order can you please tell me which item are you interested in? If you already placed it, can I have your order number and email address?

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All our items are made in China.

templates.name: Restock button (brand specific)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I would be more than happy to sign you up for our restock notifications. Can I please have your email address?

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: All our clothes are shipped from Boston.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at Saks, Bloomingdales, and Neiman Marcus.

templates.name: How did you get my phone number (brand specific)
templates.content: It looks like you have been subscribed to our SMS marketing messages for MILLY. If you didn't mean to sign up for this, let me know and I can remove you from our text message marketing list. Otherwise, I'm happy to help you with any questions you have today!

templates.name: How can I start my return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://www.milly.com/apps/returns

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.milly.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Size Chart: Women - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our women's size chart here: https://www.milly.com/pages/size-chart
